about-story-img-c7e418.query:
That is the brief our founder gave the first Artitect team in
              1986, and it is still the brief today. Our folding machines are
              not the loudest in the room. They are the ones the operator
              quietly trusts at the end of a long shift — the ones whose bends
              are still square at midnight, whose interfaces still make sense
              after twenty years. A machine should disappear into its work. We build folding machines the way an architect designs a building. precision metal craftsmanship engineering studio

about-preview-img-2f9a13.query:
ARTITECT MACHINERY was founded in 1986 in a small workshop in
            Modena, where a team of engineers and architects set out to build
            folding machines that earned their place in a workshop the same
            way a fine instrument earns its place on a stage. Four decades of folding steel — quietly, accurately, beautifully. machinist workshop precision metal craftsmanship workshop interior
